title: RHCSA 10 Lab 03: IPv6 Networking
description: Configure persistent IPv6 networking with NetworkManager

tasks: Configure the active client connection with IPv6 address fd00:10::45/64.
Ensure IPv6 method is manual and the profile autoconnects.
hints: Modify the connection profile rather than using ip addr add.
Use nmcli -g to verify persistent profile values.
checks: nmcli -g ipv6.addresses connection show 'System eth1' | grep -qx 'fd00:10::45/64'
nmcli -g ipv6.gateway connection show 'System eth1' | grep -qx 'fd00:10::1'
nmcli -g ipv6.method,connection.autoconnect connection show 'System eth1' | grep -qx manual && nmcli -g connection.autoconnect connection show 'System eth1' | grep -qx yes
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Configure the active client connection with IPv6 address fd00:10::45/64
Ensure IPv6 method is manual and the profile autoconnects
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify 'System eth1' ipv6.addresses fd00:10::45/64
nmcli connection modify 'System eth1' ipv6.gateway fd00:10::1
nmcli connection modify 'System eth1' ipv6.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
